sanskrit_text: कर्मण्येवाधिकारस्ते मा फलेषु कदाचन। मा कर्मफलहेतुर्भूर्मा ते सङ्गोऽस्त्वकर्मणि॥
hindi_meaning: तुम्हारा अधिकार केवल कर्म करने में है फल में कभी नहीं। फल की चिंता छोड़कर अपना कर्तव्य करो।
english_meaning: You have the right to perform your duty but not to the fruits of action. Do your work without attachment to results.
practical_application: Exam ya interview se pehle sirf apni preparation par focus karo. Result ki chinta mat karo — best effort do. Ye anxiety kam karti hai aur performance improve hoti hai.

hindi_meaning: सुख-दुःख अस्थायी हैं। इन्हें सहन करना सीखो।
english_meaning: Pleasures and pains are temporary. Endure them bravely O Arjuna.
practical_application: Career mein rejection aur failures temporary hain. Ek company ne reject kiya toh dusri milegi. Emotional resilience develop karo — ye har successful professional ki quality hoti hai.

sanskrit_text: उद्धरेदात्मनात्मानं नात्मानमवसादयेत्। आत्मैव ह्यात्मनो बन्धुरात्मैव रिपुरात्मनः॥
hindi_meaning: अपने द्वारा अपना उद्धार करो। तुम खुद अपने सबसे बड़े मित्र भी हो और दुश्मन भी।
english_meaning: Elevate yourself through your own efforts. You alone are your best friend and worst enemy.
practical_application: Self-improvement sirf apni zimmedari hai. Kisi aur ka wait mat karo — mentor guide kar sakta hai lekin mehnat tumhe khud karni hai. Apni galtiyon se seekho aur aage badho.

hindi_meaning: दुःख में घबराता नहीं सुख में लालची नहीं — ऐसा स्थिरबुद्धि व्यक्ति ही ज्ञानी कहलाता है।
english_meaning: One untroubled in suffering untempted in pleasure and free from fear and anger is called a sage of steady wisdom.
practical_application: Success aur failure dono mein samabhaav rakho. Promotion mila toh zyada mat udhao reject hua toh toot mat jao. Emotional balance hi long-term success ki key hai.

sanskrit_text: यद्यदाचरति श्रेष्ठस्तत्तदेवेतरो जनः। स यत्प्रमाणं कुरुते लोकस्तदनुवर्तते॥
hindi_meaning: श्रेष्ठ जो करता है लोग उसका अनुसरण करते हैं। वो जो मानक बनाता है दुनिया उसे अपनाती है।
english_meaning: Whatever a great person does others follow. Whatever standards they set the world follows.
practical_application: Tum apni team ya class ke leader ho — tumhara behavior contagious hai. Agar tum discipline maintain karte ho samay par kaam karte ho aur honest rehte ho toh doosre bhi aise bante hain.

sanskrit_text: ध्यायतो विषयान्पुंसः सङ्गस्तेषूपजायते। सङ्गात्सञ्जायते कामः कामात्क्रोधोऽभिजायते॥
hindi_meaning: विषयों का बार-बार चिंतन आसक्ति पैदा करता है आसक्ति से काम और काम से क्रोध उत्पन्न होता है।
english_meaning: Constant contemplation of sense objects leads to attachment then desire then anger.
practical_application: Social media ya gaming par zyada time mat lagao — ye habit ban jaati hai. Productive cheezein socho skills seekhna goals banana. Jaise sochoge waise banoge.

sanskrit_text: मनो दुर्निग्रहं चलम्। अभ्यासेन तु कौन्तेय वैराग्येण च गृह्यते॥
hindi_meaning: मन चंचल और कठिनता से वश में होने वाला है। परन्तु अभ्यास और वैराग्य से इसे काबू किया जा सकता है।
english_meaning: The mind is restless and difficult to control but it can be mastered through practice and detachment.
practical_application: Concentration nahi ho rahi? Normal hai. Roz 20 min meditation ya Pomodoro technique try karo. Consistently practice karte raho — ek hafte mein fark dikhega. Mind ko train kiya ja sakta hai.

sanskrit_text: यत्र योगेश्वरः कृष्णो यत्र पार्थो धनुर्धरः। तत्र श्रीर्विजयो भूतिर्ध्रुवा नीतिर्मतिर्मम॥
hindi_meaning: जहाँ ज्ञान और पुरुषार्थ दोनों हैं वहीं समृद्धि और विजय है।
english_meaning: Where there is knowledge combined with action there is prosperity victory and morality.
practical_application: Success ke liye sirf knowledge enough nahi — action bhi chahiye. Books padho courses karo lekin saath hi practice karo projects banao interviews dete raho. Theory + Practice = Success.

sanskrit_text: नेहाभिक्रमनाशोऽस्ति प्रत्यवायो न विद्यते। स्वल्पमप्यस्य धर्मस्य त्रायते महतो भयात्॥
hindi_meaning: इस path में छोटा सा भी प्रयास बर्बाद नहीं होता। थोड़ी भी sadhna बड़े भय से बचाती है।
english_meaning: In this path no effort is wasted. Even a little practice protects one from great fear.
practical_application: Roz 30 minute padhna bhi count karta hai. Consistent small efforts compound over time. Kal se nahi — abhi se shuru karo chahe thoda hi ho. Ek skill seekhna start karo aur roz thoda badhao.

sanskrit_text: यदा यदा हि धर्मस्य ग्लानिर्भवति भारत। तदात्मानं सृजाम्यहम्॥
hindi_meaning: जब-जब adharm badhta hai tab-tab ek nayi shakti sahi raah dikhaane aati hai।
english_meaning: Whenever righteousness declines I manifest myself to restore balance and justice.
practical_application: Jab system corrupt lage ya sab galat ho raha ho — hope mat chhodna. Badlaav aata hai. Aur tum bhi us change ka hissa ban sakte ho. Apni field mein integrity maintain karo — ek din ye matter karega.

sanskrit_text: न हि ज्ञानेन सदृशं पवित्रमिह विद्यते
hindi_meaning: ज्ञान से बढ़कर कोई पवित्र वस्तु नहीं है इस संसार में।
english_meaning: There is nothing as purifying as knowledge in this world.
practical_application: Hamesha seekhte raho — chahe technical skill ho ya soft skill. Knowledge kabhi waste nahi jaati. Books padho online courses karo mentors se sikho. Lifelong learning hi asli competitive advantage hai.

sanskrit_text: प्रकृतेः क्रियमाणानि गुणैः कर्माणि सर्वशः। अहङ्कारविमूढात्मा कर्ताहमिति मन्यते॥
hindi_meaning: Prakriti ke gunon dwara saari kriyaayein ho rahi hain lekin ahankaar ke kaaran jeev khud ko karta maanta hai।
english_meaning: All actions are performed by the qualities of nature but the ego-deluded person thinks I am the doer.
practical_application: Ego career ka sabse bada enemy hai. Overconfidence mat aane do. Hamesha humble raho — sikhne wala mindset rakho. Chaahe seniority kitni bhi ho new things seekhne ki tayyari honi chahiye.

sanskrit_text: अनन्याश्चिन्तयन्तो मां ये जनाः पर्युपासते। तेषां नित्याभियुक्तानां योगक्षेमं वहाम्यहम्॥
hindi_meaning: Jo log ekagra hokar apna kaam karte hain unki zarooratein khud poori hoti hain।
english_meaning: Those who worship Me with devotion I ensure their welfare and provide what they lack.
practical_application: Ek kaam mein specialization karo — jack of all trades mat bano. Ek skill ko master level tak le jao. Depth beats breadth in the long run. Companies highest pay karte hain experts ko not generalists.

hindi_meaning: Isliye uth jao aur yash prapt karo। Opportunity tumhara wait kar rahi hai।
english_meaning: Therefore arise and win glory. The opportunity awaits you.
practical_application: Kal se nahi — aaj se uthho. Apna resume update karo. Ek application bhejo. Ek new skill seekhni shuru karo. Action ki power sochne se hazaaron guna zyada hai. Opportunity sirf unko milti hai jo tayyar rehte hain.

sanskrit_text: आपूर्यमाणमचलप्रतिष्ठं समुद्रमापः प्रविशन्ति यद्वत्। तद्वत्कामा यं प्रविशन्ति सर्वे स शान्तिमाप्नोति न कामकामी॥
hindi_meaning: Jaise samudra mein paani aata rehta hai phir bhi woh stir rehta hai waise hi jo desires aane par bhi calm rehta hai use hi shanti milti hai।
english_meaning: As the ocean remains undisturbed by rivers flowing into it one who is not disturbed by desires attains peace.
practical_application: Peer pressure aur social comparison se disturb mat ho. Doosre kya kar rahe hain kya le rahe hain — iska apne goals par dhyan mat banto. Apne path par clear raho aur distractions ko absorb karo without getting disturbed.
